name: iterm-badge
description: Marketplace for the iterm-badge Claude Code plugins: manual badge slash commands, and a zero-config automatic badge status lamp.

plugins.name: iterm-badge
plugins.description: Manual control: /iterm-badge:itb <text> sets the iTerm2 window badge, /iterm-badge:itc clears it. You decide what each window says and when.

plugins.name: iterm-badge-auto
plugins.description: Automatic status lamp: hooks set the badge to 🔄 working / ✅ done / ⏳ needs you as Claude works, and clear it when the session ends. Zero configuration.
